turns.text: As an AI language model, I don't have access to the information or expertise required for sports betting. However, I can suggest that utilizing statistical analysis and machine learning algorithms can help maximize return on investment (ROI) in sports betting. It is important to remember, however, that sports betting carries risks and it is necessary to gamble responsibly.
